title: Better Dividend Stock: AbbVie or Viatris?
text: These pharmaceutical companies are profitable and offer above-average dividends.

title: 3 Stocks With Dividends of 3% or More to Buy on the Dip
text: Three underpriced healthcare stocks provide an opportunity.

title: Viatris (VTRS) Wins in Court Against AstraZeneca's Symbicort
text: Viatris (VTRS) and its partner win a court decision that invalidates branded drug Symbicort's patent and opens the door for them to launch their generic version of the drug.

title: Viatris Executive Charged With Insider Trading
text: Prosecutors and regulators say Ramkumar Rayapureddy, global chief information officer, tipped a friend about a regulatory drug approval.

title: Want to Collect a High Dividend Every Month? Buy These 3 Stocks
text: Together, these stocks will ensure you're receiving a dividend each month of the year.

title: Making Sense of the Earnings Picture and Estimate Revisions
text: Looking at 2022 Q3 as a whole, total S&P 500 earnings are currently expected to be up +1.5% from the same period last year on +11.4% higher revenues. Excluding contributions from the Energy sector, Q3 earnings for the rest of the index would be -6.0%

title: Viatris: A Spinoff That Got Even More Interesting
text: Viatris' business is holding up better than expected, despite FX headwinds. A new path to growth clears visibility for investors as the company targets to be the next ophthalmology leader.

title: Why Viatris (VTRS) Is Buying Oyster Point (OYST)
text: Viatris (VTRS) announced it is buying Oyster Point Pharma (OYST). This is why.

title: Viatris Inc. (VTRS) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Viatris Inc. (NASDAQ:VTRS ) Q3 2022 Results Conference Call November 7, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Bill Szablewski - Head of Global Capital Markets Robert Coury - Executive Chairman Michael Goettler - Chief Executive Officer Rajiv Malik - President Dr. Jeff Nau - Oyster Point CEO Sanjeev Narula - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Elliot Wilbur - Raymond James Umer Raffat - Evercore Chris Schott - JPMorgan Gary Nachman - BMO Capital Markets Ash Verma - UBS Jason Gerberry - Bank of America Glenn Santangelo - Jefferies Greg Fraser - Truist Securities Nathan Rich - Goldman Sachs David Amsellem - Piper Sandler Operator Good morning. title: Viatris (VTRS) Q3 Earnings Beat, Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Viatris (VTRS) beats on Q3 earnings but misses sales estimates as fluctuations in foreign exchange rates continue to impact results. The company reaffirms guidance.

title: Why Viatris Stock Is Jumping Today
text: Investors are applauding a key step in Viatris' plans to return to growth.

title: Why Viatris Shares Are Soaring Higher - Viatris (NASDAQ:VTRS)
text: Viatris Inc (NASDAQ: VTRS) shares are trading higher by 16.80% to $11.33 Monday morning after the company announced it will acquire Oyster Point Pharma. What Happened?

title: Viatris (VTRS) Stock Pops 17% on Acquisition News
text: Viatris (NASDAQ: VTRS ) issued a press release today with a slew of good news. For one thing, Viatris is acquiring two different businesses.

title: Viatris (VTRS) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Viatris (VTRS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.88% and 1.48%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
